name.ja: 人造人間－サイコ・エナジー・ショッカー

text.en: This card's name becomes "Jinzo" while in the field or GY. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can destroy all Traps your opponent controls (if a card is Set, reveal it), then this card gains 300 ATK for each card destroyed this way. You can only use this effect of "Jinzo - Energy Shocker" once per turn. Your opponent cannot activate Trap Cards or effects while you have another monster in your field or GY that mentions "Dark Time Wizard".
